word: H7455 - רֹעַ - rôaʻ - ro'-ah - [idiom] be so bad

sections.paragraph:
Original: רע

Transliteration: rôa‛

Phonetic: ro'-ah

BDB Definition:

  1. badness, evil
    1. badness, bad quality
    2. wilfulness
    3. evil, badness (ethical)
    4. sadness

Origin: from H7489

TWOT entry: 2191b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
